name: NCB impact after motor claim
description: User filed a motor claim and wants to know NCB impact

input.message: I had 25% NCB on my car insurance and filed one claim this year for ₹30,000 damage. Will I lose all my NCB? My premium was ₹12,000 before. What will it be next year?

notes: Filing a claim resets NCB to 0%. Next year premium: ₹12,000 / (1-0.25) × (1-0) = ~₹16,000. Should explain NCB protection add-on as alternative. Also mention: for small claims (₹30K), may be better to self-pay vs losing NCB.
